sys_update_xml.name: sys_script_include_0b8b12422be7ba10f0a9f42ac891bff6
sys_update_xml.payload:
<?xml version="1.0" encoding="UTF-8"?><record_update table="sys_script_include"><sys_script_include action="INSERT_OR_UPDATE"><access>package_private</access><active>true</active><api_name>x_caci_crm_wxcc_vx.TranscriptProcessor</api_name><caller_access/><client_callable>true</client_callable><description/><mobile_callable>false</mobile_callable><name>TranscriptProcessor</name><sandbox_callable>false</sandbox_callable><script><![CDATA[var TranscriptProcessor = Class.create();
TranscriptProcessor.prototype = Object.extendsObject(global.AbstractAjaxProcessor, {
  addTranscriptMessage: function() {
    var logPrefix = '[TranscriptProcessor.addTranscriptMessage]';

    try {
      var gaHelper = new GlideAjaxHelper();
      var transcriptData = gaHelper.getStringFromParameter(this.getParameter('sysparm_transcriptdata'));

      if (!transcriptData) {
        gs.error(logPrefix + ' Missing sysparm_transcriptdata');
        return JSON.stringify({ error: 'No transcript data found' });
      }

      var data = JSON.parse(transcriptData);

      if (!data.sharedRecordId) {
        gs.error(logPrefix + ' Missing sharedRecordId');
        return JSON.stringify({ error: 'Missing sharedRecordId' });
      }

      // If established is empty, use 0 offsets (message arrived before call was established)
      var start = 0;
      if (data.established) {
        start = new GlideDateTime(data.established).getNumericValue();
        if (!start || isNaN(start)) {
          gs.error(logPrefix + ' Could not parse established: ' + data.established);
          return JSON.stringify({ error: 'Invalid established timestamp' });
        }
      }

      var beginOffset = start ? data.startTimestamp - start : 0;
      var endOffset = start ? data.endTimestamp - start : 0;

      var participantId = data.role === '2_Agent' ? 'AGENT' : 'CUSTOMER';

      var request = [{
        isEvent: false,
        isInternalMessage: false,
        beginOffsetMillis: beginOffset,
        content: data.transcript,
        endOffsetMillis: endOffset,
        participantId: participantId,
        sentiment: 'NEUTRAL',
        id: undefined,
        loudnessScore: null
      }];

      var result = new sn_cs.VoiceTranscriptObject.addVoiceInteractionMessage(
        data.sharedRecordId,
        JSON.stringify(request)
      );

      if (!result) {
        gs.error(logPrefix + ' addVoiceInteractionMessage returned no result for sharedRecordId: ' + data.sharedRecordId);
        return JSON.stringify({ error: 'Add message error' });
      }

      return JSON.stringify({ message: result });

    } catch (ex) {
      var msg = ex.getMessage ? ex.getMessage() : String(ex);
      gs.error(logPrefix + ' Exception: ' + msg);
      return JSON.stringify({ error: 'Exception', message: msg });
    }
  },

  type: 'TranscriptProcessor'
});]]></script><sys_class_name>sys_script_include</sys_class_name><sys_created_by>admin</sys_created_by><sys_created_on>2026-03-12 09:08:57</sys_created_on><sys_id>0b8b12422be7ba10f0a9f42ac891bff6</sys_id><sys_mod_count>14</sys_mod_count><sys_name>TranscriptProcessor</sys_name><sys_package display_value="Cisco Webex Contact Center" source="x_caci_crm_wxcc_vx">fc8e5f4a8372b210ab2a7629feaad3d4</sys_package><sys_policy>read</sys_policy><sys_scope display_value="Cisco Webex Contact Center">fc8e5f4a8372b210ab2a7629feaad3d4</sys_scope><sys_update_name>sys_script_include_0b8b12422be7ba10f0a9f42ac891bff6</sys_update_name><sys_updated_by>admin</sys_updated_by><sys_updated_on>2026-04-29 13:05:16</sys_updated_on></sys_script_include></record_update>

sys_update_xml.name: content_css_ee12a78e8372b210ab2a7629feaad346
sys_update_xml.payload:
<?xml version="1.0" encoding="UTF-8"?><record_update table="content_css"><content_css action="INSERT_OR_UPDATE"><name>gadget_stylesheet</name><style>html, body, #root {
  height: 100%;
  margin: 0;
  width: 100%;
}

#root {
  border: none;
  position: fixed;
}

html, body {
  overflow: hidden;
}

body {
    background-repeat: no-repeat;
    background-position: center 50px;
	background-color: white;
    background-image:url("data:image/svg+xml;utf8,<svg xmlns='http://www.w3.org/2000/svg' version='1.1' height='50px' width='200px'><text x='0' y='15' fill='gray' font-size='18'>Waiting for ServiceNow...</text></svg>");
}

/* hides any content besides our gadget */
body > *:not(#root) {
  display: none;
}
</style><sys_class_name>content_css</sys_class_name><sys_created_by>admin</sys_created_by><sys_created_on>2026-02-03 07:29:50</sys_created_on><sys_id>ee12a78e8372b210ab2a7629feaad346</sys_id><sys_mod_count>3</sys_mod_count><sys_name>gadget_stylesheet</sys_name><sys_package display_value="Cisco Webex Contact Center" source="x_caci_crm_wxcc_vx">fc8e5f4a8372b210ab2a7629feaad3d4</sys_package><sys_policy/><sys_scope display_value="Cisco Webex Contact Center">fc8e5f4a8372b210ab2a7629feaad3d4</sys_scope><sys_update_name>content_css_ee12a78e8372b210ab2a7629feaad346</sys_update_name><sys_updated_by>admin</sys_updated_by><sys_updated_on>2026-02-04 08:06:32</sys_updated_on><type>local</type><url/></content_css></record_update>

sys_update_xml.name: sys_ws_operation_f70ef7f22b57be907939ff29c891bf60
sys_update_xml.payload:
<?xml version="1.0" encoding="UTF-8"?><record_update table="sys_ws_operation"><sys_ws_operation action="INSERT_OR_UPDATE"><active>true</active><consumes>application/json,application/xml,text/xml</consumes><consumes_customized>false</consumes_customized><default_operation_uri/><enforce_acl>784c1ab72bac0f14f0a9f42ac891bfb0</enforce_acl><http_method>POST</http_method><name>Cisco_CCIF_Subflow</name><operation_script><![CDATA[(function process(/*RESTAPIRequest*/ request, /*RESTAPIResponse*/ response) {
	var requestBody = request.body;
	var requestData = requestBody.data;
	{
		action_type = requestData.action_type;
		cisco_phone_number = requestData.cisco_phone_number;
		cisco_collected_digits = requestData.cisco_collected_digits;
		servicenow_subflow_name = requestData.servicenow_subflow_name; 
		servicenow_interaction_sysid = requestData.servicenow_interaction_sysid;
		cisco_callvariable_1 = requestData.cisco_callvariable_1;
		cisco_callvariable_2 = requestData.cisco_callvariable_2; 
		cisco_callvariable_3 = requestData.cisco_callvariable_3; 
		cisco_callvariable_4 = requestData.cisco_callvariable_4; 
		cisco_callvariable_5 = requestData.cisco_callvariable_5; 
		cisco_callvariable_6 = requestData.cisco_callvariable_6; 
		cisco_callvariable_7 = requestData.cisco_callvariable_7; 
		cisco_callvariable_8 = requestData.cisco_callvariable_8; 
		cisco_callvariable_9 = requestData.cisco_callvariable_9; 
		cisco_callvariable_10 = requestData.cisco_callvariable_10; 
	}

	var inputs = {};
	inputs['action_type'] = action_type; // String 
	inputs['cisco_phone_number'] = cisco_phone_number; // String 
	inputs['cisco_collected_digits'] = cisco_collected_digits; // String 
	inputs['servicenow_interaction_sysid'] = servicenow_interaction_sysid; // String 
	inputs['cisco_callvariable_1'] = cisco_callvariable_1; // String
	inputs['cisco_callvariable_2'] = cisco_callvariable_2; // String 
	inputs['cisco_callvariable_3'] = cisco_callvariable_3; // String 
	inputs['cisco_callvariable_4'] = cisco_callvariable_4; // String 
	inputs['cisco_callvariable_5'] = cisco_callvariable_5; // String 
	inputs['cisco_callvariable_6'] = cisco_callvariable_6; // String 
	inputs['cisco_callvariable_7'] = cisco_callvariable_7; // String 
	inputs['cisco_callvariable_8'] = cisco_callvariable_8; // String 
	inputs['cisco_callvariable_9'] = cisco_callvariable_9; // String 
	inputs['cisco_callvariable_10'] = cisco_callvariable_10; // String 

	var result = sn_fd.FlowAPI.getRunner().subflow(servicenow_subflow_name).inForeground().withInputs(inputs).run();
	var outputs = result.getOutputs();
	
	var subflow_code = outputs['subflow_code']; // String
	var subflow_message = outputs['subflow_message']; // String
	var subflow_variable_1 = outputs['subflow_variable_1']; // String
	var subflow_variable_2 = outputs['subflow_variable_2']; // String
	var subflow_variable_3 = outputs['subflow_variable_3']; // String
	var subflow_variable_4 = outputs['subflow_variable_4']; // String
	var subflow_variable_5 = outputs['subflow_variable_5']; // String
	var subflow_variable_6 = outputs['subflow_variable_6']; // String
	var subflow_variable_7 = outputs['subflow_variable_7']; // String
	var subflow_variable_8 = outputs['subflow_variable_8']; // String
	var subflow_variable_9 = outputs['subflow_variable_9']; // String
	var subflow_variable_10 = outputs['subflow_variable_10']; // String


	response.setBody({
		"subflow_code":  subflow_code,
		"subflow_message":  subflow_message,

	});
	return;

})
(request, response);]]></operation_script><operation_uri>/api/x_caci_crm_wxcc_vx/cisco_ccif/run_subflow</operation_uri><produces>application/json,application/xml,text/xml</produces><produces_customized>false</produces_customized><relative_path>/run_subflow</relative_path><request_example/><requires_acl_authorization>true</requires_acl_authorization><requires_authentication>true</requires_authentication><requires_snc_internal_role>true</requires_snc_internal_role><short_description/><sys_class_name>sys_ws_operation</sys_class_name><sys_created_by>admin</sys_created_by><sys_created_on>2026-03-02 14:00:45</sys_created_on><sys_id>f70ef7f22b57be907939ff29c891bf60</sys_id><sys_mod_count>16</sys_mod_count><sys_name>Cisco_CCIF_Subflow</sys_name><sys_package display_value="Cisco Webex Contact Center" source="x_caci_crm_wxcc_vx">fc8e5f4a8372b210ab2a7629feaad3d4</sys_package><sys_policy/><sys_scope display_value="Cisco Webex Contact Center">fc8e5f4a8372b210ab2a7629feaad3d4</sys_scope><sys_update_name>sys_ws_operation_f70ef7f22b57be907939ff29c891bf60</sys_update_name><sys_updated_by>admin</sys_updated_by><sys_updated_on>2026-05-07 12:46:02</sys_updated_on><web_service_definition display_value="Cisco_CCIF">c7edb3f22b57be907939ff29c891bfef</web_service_definition><web_service_version/></sys_ws_operation></record_update>

sys_update_xml.name: sys_script_include_63ad84322b8bf2507939ff29c891bf8f
sys_update_xml.payload:
<?xml version="1.0" encoding="UTF-8"?><record_update table="sys_script_include"><sys_script_include action="INSERT_OR_UPDATE"><access>package_private</access><active>true</active><api_name>x_caci_crm_wxcc_vx.restApiProcessor</api_name><caller_access/><client_callable>true</client_callable><description/><mobile_callable>false</mobile_callable><name>restApiProcessor</name><sandbox_callable>false</sandbox_callable><script><![CDATA[var restApiProcessor = Class.create();
restApiProcessor.prototype = Object.extendsObject(global.AbstractAjaxProcessor, {

  // ========== Public methods (GlideAjax entry points) ==========

  closeInteraction: function() {
    return this._handle('closeInteraction', function(self, r) {
      var interactionId = self.getParameter('sysparm_interactionId');

      if (!self._isValidId(interactionId)) {
        return { error: 'Invalid interactionId' };
      }

      self._setEndpoint(r, { interactionId: interactionId });
    });
  },

  offerInteraction: function() {
    return this._handle('offerInteraction', function(self, r) {
      var data = self._parseData();
      if (data.error) return data;

      if (!self._isValidId(data.sharedRecordId)) {
        return { error: 'Invalid sharedRecordId' };
      }

      self._setEndpoint(r, { sharedRecordId: data.sharedRecordId });


      r.setRequestBody(JSON.stringify(data.payload));
    });
  },

  initiateWrapup: function() {
    return this._handle('initiateWrapup', function(self, r) {
      var data = self._parseData();
      if (data.error) return data;

      if (!data.payload.agent_sys_id || !data.payload.interaction_sys_id) {
        return { error: 'Missing agent_sys_id or interaction_sys_id' };
      }

      self._setEndpoint(r);

      r.setRequestBody(JSON.stringify(data.payload));
    });
  },

  // ========== Private helpers ==========

  /**
   * Generic handler that wraps:
   *  - REST Message instantiation
   *  - Endpoint / body setup (via the provided setup callback)
   *  - Execution + error handling
   *  - Uniform JSON response
   */
  _handle: function(methodName, setupCallback) {
    var logPrefix = '[Cisco_CCIF.' + methodName + ']';

    try {
      var r = new sn_ws.RESTMessageV2('Cisco_CCIF', methodName);

      var setupResult = setupCallback(this, r);
      if (setupResult && setupResult.error) {
        gs.error(logPrefix + ' ' + setupResult.error);
        return JSON.stringify({ status: 0, error: setupResult.error });
      }

      var response = r.execute();
      var statusCode = response.getStatusCode();
      var body = response.getBody();

      if (response.haveError() || statusCode >= 400) {
        gs.error(logPrefix + ' Failed - status: ' + statusCode + ', body: ' + body);
      }

      return JSON.stringify({ status: statusCode, body: body });

    } catch (ex) {
      var msg = ex.getMessage ? ex.getMessage() : String(ex);
      gs.error(logPrefix + ' Exception: ' + msg);
      return JSON.stringify({ status: 0, error: msg });
    }
  },

  /**
   * Parses sysparm_data from the request.
   * Returns the parsed object, or an object with an `error` property on failure.
   */
  _parseData: function() {
    var rawData = this.getParameter('sysparm_data');
    if (!rawData) {
      return { error: 'Missing sysparm_data' };
    }
    try {
      return JSON.parse(rawData);
    } catch (ex) {
      return { error: 'Invalid JSON in sysparm_data' };
    }
  },

  /**
   * Builds the full endpoint URL from glide.servlet.uri + the method's configured
   * relative path, substituting any ${key} placeholders with values from `substitutions`.
   */
  _setEndpoint: function(restMessage, substitutions) {
    var baseUrl = (gs.getProperty('glide.servlet.uri') || '').replace(/\/$/, '');
    var path = restMessage.getEndpoint() || '';

    if (substitutions) {
      Object.keys(substitutions).forEach(function(key) {
        path = path.replace('${' + key + '}', encodeURIComponent(substitutions[key]));
      });
    }

    if (path.charAt(0) !== '/') {
      path = '/' + path;
    }

    restMessage.setEndpoint(baseUrl + path);
  },

  /**
   * Validates that an ID contains only safe URL-path characters.
   */
  _isValidId: function(id) {
    return typeof id === 'string' && /^[a-zA-Z0-9\-_]+$/.test(id);
  },

  type: 'restApiProcessor'
});

// ========================================================================
// HOW TO ADD A NEW METHOD
// ------------------------------------------------------------------------
//
// Template:
//
//   myNewMethod: function() {
//       return this._handle('myNewMethod', function(self, r) {
//
//           // Parse & validate input
//           var data = self._parseData();
//           if (data.error) return data;
//
//           if (!self._isValidId(data.someId)) {
//               return { error: 'Invalid someId' };
//           }
//
//           // Path placeholders (${someId} in the method's Endpoint)
//           self._setEndpoint(r, { someId: data.someId });
//
//           // Build the request body directly as a JS object
//           var payload = {
//               foo: data.foo,
//               bar: data.bar
//           };
//           r.setRequestBody(JSON.stringify(payload));
//       });
//   }
//
// Helpers:
//   self._parseData()         -> parsed sysparm_data, or { error: ... }
//   self._isValidId(id)       -> true if safe for URL path
//   self._setEndpoint(r, {})  -> builds full URL from glide.servlet.uri
//
// REST Message method setup:
//   - Name: must match the method name above
//   - HTTP method: GET / POST / PATCH / PUT / DELETE
//   - Endpoint: relative path, e.g. "api/now/v1/foo/${someId}/bar"
//   - HTTP Headers: Accept + Content-Type = application/json (if body)
//   - Content: leave empty — body is built in script via setRequestBody
//   - Variable Substitutions: not needed — placeholders are resolved in script
//
// Return a { error: '...' } object from the callback to abort with a
// validation error. Exceptions are auto-caught by _handle.
// ========================================================================]]></script><sys_class_name>sys_script_include</sys_class_name><sys_created_by>admin</sys_created_by><sys_created_on>2026-02-17 10:14:26</sys_created_on><sys_id>63ad84322b8bf2507939ff29c891bf8f</sys_id><sys_mod_count>84</sys_mod_count><sys_name>restApiProcessor</sys_name><sys_package display_value="Cisco Webex Contact Center" source="x_caci_crm_wxcc_vx">fc8e5f4a8372b210ab2a7629feaad3d4</sys_package><sys_policy>read</sys_policy><sys_scope display_value="Cisco Webex Contact Center">fc8e5f4a8372b210ab2a7629feaad3d4</sys_scope><sys_update_name>sys_script_include_63ad84322b8bf2507939ff29c891bf8f</sys_update_name><sys_updated_by>admin</sys_updated_by><sys_updated_on>2026-05-06 13:34:12</sys_updated_on></sys_script_include></record_update>
